chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.Nos.D-5300, 5301 & 5302 of 2022 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 06.03.2025 Mr.Sami-ur-Rehman, Advocate for the Petitioners. Dr.Shahnawaz, Advocate for Respondent (F.B.R) Mr.Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Attorney General. Per learned counsel in these petitions show cause notices have been impugned. Learned counsel states that it may be just and proper for the Department that the notices may be adjudicated vide speaking order after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioners and pending the aforesaid no coercive action may be taken their against. Respective learned counsel for the respondent articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that these petitions may be disposed of as above. Order accordingly. Let copy of this order be placed in each connected petition. Judge Judge nasir
